mapper.insert: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO tool_call_cache (tool_name, params_hash, result_json, ttl_seconds, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{toolName}, #{paramsHash}, #{resultJson}, #{ttlSeconds}, datetime('now'), datetime('now'))
mapper.update: UPDATE tool_call_cache SET hit_count = hit_count + 1, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tool_call_cache WHERE datetime(created_at, '+' || ttl_seconds || ' seconds') <= datetime('now')
mapper.select: SELECT id, tool_name, params_hash, result_json, ttl_seconds, hit_count, created_at, updated_at FROM tool_call_cache ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
